title: combretum excelsum
intro: Combretum excelsum, also known as the Large Bushwillow, is a tree or shrub species native to southern Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and wounds. The health benefits of Combretum excelsum include its ability to reduce inflammation and pain, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Combretum excelsum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other medicinal products.
